title: BUDAPEST diary
description:
BUDAPEST DIARY
Der Vorwärtsgänger

Documentary.
A series of on the spot interviews at various places in the City of Budapest.

Interview: Andras Peterffy - Jürg Da Vaz, June - July 1998.

Filmed on site on different location in Budapest, Hungary

Da Vaz production© 1998
